input.reason: Two simultaneous high-severity TTPs confirmed on WEB-07: (1) active beaconing to a known-bad C2 IP — consistent with Cobalt Strike/implant callback (MITRE T1071/T1095); (2) credential-dumping behavior, likely targeting LSASS (MITRE T1003.001). The combination strongly indicates an active hands-on-keyboard intrusion with lateral movement risk. Immediate network isolation is recommended to prevent credential re-use, lateral spread, and further C2 tasking while forensic imaging is conducted.
